allow: PowerShell(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('lint-staged:', !!p['lint-staged']\); console.log\('husky-dep:', !!\(p.devDependencies && p.devDependencies.husky\)\); console.log\('typebox-dep:', !!\(p.dependencies && p.dependencies['@sinclair/typebox']\) || !!\(p.devDependencies && p.devDependencies['@sinclair/typebox']\)\); console.log\('prepare-script:', p.scripts && p.scripts.prepare\);")
PowerShell(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('bin:', JSON.stringify\(p.bin, null, 2\)\); console.log\('lint-staged:', JSON.stringify\(p['lint-staged'], null, 2\)\);")
PowerShell(npx biome --version; node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('biome-dep:', p.devDependencies && p.devDependencies['@biomejs/biome']\)")
PowerShell(git diff biome.json | Select-Object -First 60; Write-Output "---check---"; npx biome check . 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 8)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; Write-Output "---"; npx vitest run tests/core/schemas 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10; Write-Output "---"; npx vitest run tests/core/schemas 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
